narrative:
Coldwater Southeast (precinct in Mercer County) has 824 registered voters, with 51.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.8 percentage points.
